description: Single normative contract for AWF: workflow directory layout under cwd and JSON Schema for tasks.json. Skills and the CLI MUST link here rather than restating layout (see PRD Further Notes).

workflowDirectory.name: .awf
workflowDirectory.resolutionNote: The directory named `name` MUST exist as a child of the process current working directory. No upward directory walk.

entries.description: Backlog as a JSON array; each element MUST validate against the schema referenced by `tasksJsonSchema`.
Optional product requirements document; when present the AWF CLI adds a path-only hint to the assembled agent prompt (not part of bundled prompt.md) so the agent can read the file on demand.

pinning.purpose: Pin skills and tooling to an immutable contract by URL at a release tag (PRD User Stories 16–18).
notes: Replace `<owner>`, `<repo>`, and `<release-tag>` with your fork and semver tag.
JSON Schema `$ref` to `./tasks.schema.json` resolves relative to this file; fetch both from the same tag/path prefix.
The `version` field is contract semver; the git tag is the operational pin until a registry exists.
